steps.title: Identify the grammatical structures
steps.content: The sentence has a plural subject noun phrase: “The trailblazing accomplishments of Goldin.” The verb blank must agree with this plural subject.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content: The rule is subject-verb agreement: a plural subject requires a plural verb form. Options A (attests), B (has attested), and C (is attesting) are all singular forms. Option D (attest) is the plural form that correctly agrees with the plural subject “accomplishments.” That matches choice D — D is correct.
